c.d: Total number of active users who rate and review movies on the platform
c.s: App store analytics, company reports, third-party market research

c.d: Sophistication and granularity of the rating mechanism (scale range, half-stars, decimal precision)
c.s: App interface analysis, user documentation, feature specifications

c.d: Comprehensiveness of movie catalog including mainstream, indie, international, and historical films
c.s: Database size reports, content audits, platform specifications

c.d: Availability of features like following users, sharing reviews, creating lists, and community interaction
c.s: Feature documentation, app interface review, user guides

c.d: Ability to sync ratings and data across mobile, web, and other platforms seamlessly
c.s: Technical specifications, user testing, platform documentation

c.d: Quality of personalized movie recommendations based on user ratings and preferences
c.s: User reviews, algorithm performance studies, recommendation accuracy metrics
